what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment of type images, linking it to an image target in the design-source channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
standouts: Uses a URI target pointing to an external image resource rather than embedding the image.
Attachment is typed and timestamped but carries no content payload.
concerns: No checksum, size, or provenance for the referenced image.
Target URI cannot be validated from this file alone.
notes: This is a lightweight ledger stub that records an image attachment reference for a design-source channel pitch.
questions: Is image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-25 resolvable within the ledger?
What does p-25 represent and where is the actual image stored?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose (attachment metadata) matches the file: it records an image attachment reference with channel, type, target, and timestamp.
intention_signals: To create a durable, discoverable record associating an image with a design-source channel entry without embedding the image itself.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped attachment reference that lets a fused system know an image target exists for a design-source pitch and can be resolved later.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type images linking att-a6a4205a in the design-source channel to the image URI image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-25, recorded on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image attachment reference for a recent pitch in the design-source channel so it can be retrieved and correlated with channel memory.
